sentences.arabic: تَشْهَدُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْمُدُنِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ تَحَوُّلًا رَقْمِيًّا كَبِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Mnogi arapski gradovi svjedoče velikoj digitalnoj transformaciji.
sentences.translationEn: Many Arab cities are witnessing a major digital transformation.

sentences.arabic: يَقُومُ الشَّبَابُ بِتَأْسِيسِ شَرِكَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِتَطْوِيرِ الْبَرْمَجِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Mladi ljudi osnivaju nove kompanije za razvoj softvera.
sentences.translationEn: Young people are establishing new companies for software development.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الِابْتِكَارَاتُ فِي تَحْسِينِ الِاقْتِصَادِ وَتَسْهِيلِ حَيَاةِ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ove inovacije pomažu u poboljšanju ekonomije i olakšavanju života ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: These innovations help in improving the economy and making people's lives easier.
